ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the customer (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Marital status (1 for single, 2 for married) */,
  "num_of_dependants" INTEGER /* Number of dependants */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religious affiliation of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the customer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the customer */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "electricity_costs" REAL /* Monthly costs for electricity */,
  "income" REAL /* Current income of the customer */,
  "prev_income" REAL /* Previous income of the customer */,
  "residential_costs" REAL /* Monthly residential costs */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "bank_account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number of the customer */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Total investment amount */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Total loan amount */,
  "financial_goal" TEXT /* Primary financial goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the customer */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study or major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Job title or occupation of the customer */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position level of the customer's job */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the customer's job */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of professional experience */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residences" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer ID */,
  "city_ktp" TEXT /* City of legal residence (KTP) */,
  "city_housing" TEXT /* City of current housing */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the property (owned, rented, leased) */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the customer
Gender of the customer (1 for male, 2 for female)
Marital status (1 for single, 2 for married)
Bank account number of the customer
Highest level of education attained by the customer
Job title or occupation of the customer
Position level of the customer's job
Industry sector of the customer's job
Ownership status of the property (owned, rented, leased)
